# FDIC MCP Server 1.1.2

## Highlights

This patch release fixes the MCP registry metadata validation failure from the `1.1.1` publish attempt and prepares a clean follow-up release.

## Fixed

- Shortened the MCP registry description in `server.json` to satisfy the registry's 100-character validation limit.
- Rolled the release metadata forward so the next tagged publish can rerun the full npm, registry, package, and GitHub release workflow cleanly.

## Notes

- The npm package remains available as `fdic-mcp-server`.
- The hosted HTTP endpoint remains `https://bankfind.jflamb.com/mcp`.
- This release is intended to recover cleanly from the partial `1.1.1` publish where npm succeeded before the registry validation error stopped the workflow.
